name_cn:
Size: 16-19-6 cm
The hot-selling Utility Phone Pocket clutch has arrived. No need to doubt, we only make the best quality items! Details to follow. This bag is cut from Monogram canvas into a flexible shape, providing a place for your smartphone. A zippered pocket securely stores cards, cash, or keys. The adjustable canvas strap and metal chain are detachable, offering multiple carrying ways.
